name: libhtml-html5-entities-perl
title: libhtml-html5-entities-perl
summary: module to encode and decode character entities defined in HTML5
description:
module to encode and decode character entities defined in HTML5
HTML::HTML5::Entities is a drop-in replacement for HTML::Entities,
providing the character entities defined in HTML5. It is a pure Perl
implementation and hence slower, especially decoding.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libhtml-html5-entities-perl because module to encode and decode character entities defined in HTML5.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libhtml-html5-entities-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libhtml-html5-entities-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libhtml-html5-entities-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
